name: Sunita Behera
ai_summary: Sunita Behera has hands-on childcare experience managing daily routines and creating positive, supportive environments for children. Based in Cumming, GA, she seeks full-time work and uses a calm, communicative approach to conflict resolution by addressing issues immediately and helping children express their feelings constructively.
